title: Beyond collective fluctuations: probing micro-image swarms in lensed quasars with intensity interferometry
summary: Each strongly lensed image of a quasar behind a lensing galaxy (or galaxy cluster) is composed of a swarm of micro-images. This is a result of microlensing due to stellar-scale substructure in the lens. The presence of microlenses forms a network of micro-caustics, and a source transiting these micro-caustics gives rise to variation in observed strongly lensed images. These micro-image swarms are currently observable only through collective intensity fluctuations, which hide the underlying information on the stellar (and compact dark matter, if any) mass functions within the swarm. To unlock the information present in micro-image swarms, it is necessary to explore new techniques. In this work, we study the prospects of determining the micro-image swarm size in lensed quasar images using the intensity interferometry (i.e., the Hanbury Brown & Twiss effect). We consider QSO 2237+0305 and PS J0147+4630, two of the brightest lens quasars in the sky, and study micro-image swarm features in visibility space for both macro-minimum and macro-saddle-point images. At the end, we argue that, with ongoing and expected technical advances, observations of micro-image swarms are plausible, at least for the brightest lensed quasars.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 透镜星系（或星系团）后方类星体的每个强透镜像都由一群微像组成。这是透镜中恒星尺度子结构导致的微透镜效应所致。微透镜的存在形成了微焦线网络，源穿越这些微焦线会引起观测到的强透镜像的亮度变化。目前，这些微像群仅能通过集体强度涨落被观测到，这掩盖了群内恒星（以及可能的致密暗物质）质量函数的潜在信息。要解锁微像群中包含的信息，必须探索新技术。在本工作中，我们研究了利用强度干涉测量（即汉伯里·布朗与特威斯效应）确定透镜类星体像中微像群大小的前景。我们考虑了天空中最亮的两个透镜类星体——QSO 2237+0305 和 PS J0147+4630，并研究了宏观最小像和宏观鞍点像在可见度空间中的微像群特征。最后，我们认为，随着当前和预期的技术进步，至少对于最亮的透镜类星体，观测微像群是可行的。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：随着技术持续进步，至少对于最亮的透镜类星体，观测微像群是可能的，这为探索微像群中隐藏的恒星质量函数和致密暗物质信息提供了新途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: An illustration of tracks in the interferometric \((u,v)\) plane. Assumed here is a baseline of two telescopes at latitude about \(25^{\circ}\,\) S, separated by \(20\,\) km in the ENE–WSW direction. The tracks represent the baseline projected on a plane perpendicular to the line of sight, as the source moves across the sky. The start and endpoints of each track correspond to the source rising and setting.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：干涉测量 \((u,v)\) 平面中的轨迹示意图。此处假设基线由位于南纬约 \(25^{\circ}\,\) 的两台望远镜组成，沿ENE–WSW方向相距 \(20\,\) km。轨迹表示基线在垂直于视线方向平面上的投影，随源在天空中移动而变化。每条轨迹的起点和终点分别对应源升起和落下。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: A schematic illustration of Hanbury Brown & Twiss correlation. The gray histogram represents the distribution of arrival-time differences among pairs of photons. The smooth curve represents the theoretical correlation \(1+|\gamma(t)|^{2}\) . Timing jitter in photon detection spreads out the curve to the gray mound. The two dashed vertical lines indicate the notional time resolution.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：汉伯里·布朗与特威斯相关性的示意图。灰色直方图表示光子对到达时间差的分布。平滑曲线表示理论相关性 \(1+|\gamma(t)|^{2}\) 。光子探测中的时间抖动将曲线展宽为灰色凸起。两条虚线竖线表示标称时间分辨率。

The top-left and top-right panels show the source and image plane magnification maps, respectively. The white horizontal line(s) in the top-left and top-right panels represent the mock source and the corresponding image trajectories, respectively. Four example source positions are presented by solid points in the top-left panel, and the corresponding image positions are shown in the top-right panel. figures.caption_zh: 图3：质量为 \(M=1\,{M_{\odot}}\) 的孤立点质量透镜的光子通量。左上和右上图分别显示源平面和像平面放大率图。左上和右上图中的白色水平线分别表示模拟源和对应的像轨迹。左上图中的实心点表示四个示例源位置，右上图显示对应的像位置。中间和底部行显示这四个源位置的可见度空间。

Four example source positions are presented by solid points in the top-left panel, and the corresponding image positions are shown in the top-right panel. The middle and bottom rows show the corresponding photon flux in the visibility space.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：质量为 \(M=1\,{M_{\odot}}\) 且外部效应为 \(\kappa=0.395=\gamma\) 的点透镜的光子通量。左上和右上图分别显示源平面和像平面放大率图。左上图中的实心点表示四个示例源位置，右上图显示对应的像位置。中间和底部行显示可见度空间中对应的光子通量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Quad image formation for Huchra’s lens (QSO 2237+0305). The solid curves represent the caustic and critical curves. The solid circle represents the source position, and the corresponding image positions are shown by stars. For each image position, we also show the macro-magnification and microlens surface density (in \({M_{\odot}/pc^{2}}\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图5：Huchra透镜（QSO 2237+0305）的四重像形成。实曲线表示焦线和临界曲线。实心圆表示源位置，星号表示对应的像位置。对于每个像位置，还显示了宏观放大率和微透镜面密度（单位为 \({M_{\odot}/pc^{2}}\) ）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Microlensing and photon flux for (global) minimum image of Huchra’s lens. The left column shows the source-plane magnification maps. The source position is fixed to \((0,0)\) shown by the yellow star. The middle column shows the corresponding magnification maps of the image plane. The microlens positions are shown by white stars, whereas micro-images (with \(|\mu|>10^{-2}\) ) are shown by red stars. The yellow contours represent the time delay contours corresponding to saddle points in the time-delay surface. The right column shows the corresponding visibility space maps. While constructing the visibility space maps, we consider contributions from all micro-images.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：Huchra透镜（全局）最小像的微透镜效应和光子通量。左列显示源平面放大率图。源位置固定为 \((0,0)\) ，用黄色星号表示。中列显示对应的像平面放大率图。微透镜位置用白色星号表示，而微像（满足 \(|\mu|>10^{-2}\) ）用红色星号表示。黄色等高线表示对应于时间延迟面中鞍点的时间延迟等高线。右列显示对应的可见度空间图。在构建可见度空间图时，我们考虑了所有微像的贡献。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Microlensing and photon flux for a macro-saddle-point image of Huchra’s lens. The left column shows the source-plane magnification maps. The source position is fixed to \((0,0)\) shown by the yellow star. The middle column shows the corresponding magnification maps of the image plane. The microlens positions are shown by white stars, whereas micro-images (with \(|\mu|>10^{-2}\) ) are shown by red stars. The yellow contours represent the time delay contours corresponding to saddle points in the time-delay surface. The right column shows the corresponding visibility space maps. While constructing the visibility space maps, we consider contributions from all micro-images. For the visibility plots in each panel, we adjust the color bar values to better capture the variation.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：Huchra透镜宏观鞍点像的微透镜效应和光子通量。左列显示源平面放大率图。源位置固定为 \((0,0)\) ，用黄色星号表示。中列显示对应的像平面放大率图。微透镜位置用白色星号表示，而微像（满足 \(|\mu|>10^{-2}\) ）用红色星号表示。黄色等高线表示对应于时间延迟面中鞍点的时间延迟等高线。右列显示对应的可见度空间图。在构建可见度空间图时，我们考虑了所有微像的贡献。对于每个面板中的可见度图，我们调整了色条值以更好地捕捉变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Quad image formation for PS J0147+4630 lens system. The solid curves represent the caustic and critical curves. title: CHANG-ES XXXIX. Magnetic field structure in edge-on galaxies: Stacking Stokes parameters
comment: Accepted for publication in Astronomy and Astrophysics Sect. 4. Extragalactic astronomy
summary: Galactic magnetic fields regulate star formation and cosmic-ray (CR) transport, and understanding their three-dimensional structure, particularly in star-forming late-type galaxies, is key to constraining galactic CR transport. We explore the validity of stacking Stokes $Q$ and $U$ spectra, to infer about the intrinsic polarisation characteristics of star-forming galaxies. To prepare the stacking experiment, we align, scale, convolve, and reproject $C$-band (6 GHz) Stokes $Q$ and Stokes $U$ cubes of 27 star-forming late-type edge-on galaxies. On the stacked cubes, we perform RM-synthesis and discuss the derived polarised intensity (PI), polarisation angle ($χ_0$), and RM maps. Synthetic data tests demonstrate that stacking Stokes $Q$ and $U$ spectra is valid for tightly constrained underlying distributions of PI, $χ_0$, and RM. For underlying PI, $χ_0$, and RM distributions that represent star-forming galaxies, stacking introduces a systematic uncertainty of $δ_\mathrm{RM}^\mathrm{sys}=90 \mathrm{rad m^{-2}}$ and significantly underestimates the recovered PI. Stacking results reveal a clear X-shaped pattern in the polarisation plane, consistent with prior findings, detecting polarised emission up to 9 kpc above the galactic disc. We find stronger PI on the approaching side of galaxies. Furthermore, we find a decrease in PI in the galactic halo of $\sim 60$% near the galaxy's minor axis. A global RM pattern, as reported in a previous study, cannot be confirmed. Based on our analysis, we present stacking of Stokes $Q$ and Stokes $U$ cubes as an effective tool to recover faint polarised emission in the halo of nearby galaxies, if the underlying distributions of PI, $χ_0$, and RM are tightly constrained. Our findings motivate future studies using broader-band data to increase the resolution in Faraday depth.

AI.tldr: 本文通过堆叠27个恒星形成星系的Stokes Q和U谱线，验证了该方法在恢复星系微弱偏振辐射方面的有效性，但发现该方法对底层分布有严格要求，且会低估偏振强度，引入约90 rad/m²的系统不确定性。
AI.motivation: 理解星系的偏振特性对于约束宇宙射线传输至关重要，但单个星系的偏振信号微弱，需要发展堆叠方法以提取统计意义上的偏振信息。
AI.method: 对27个侧向恒星形成星系的C波段（6 GHz）Stokes Q和U数据立方体进行对齐、缩放、卷积和重投影，然后进行RM合成分析，并利用合成数据测试方法有效性。
AI.result: 堆叠结果显示清晰的X型偏振模式，探测到银盘以上9 kpc的偏振发射，接近侧星系的偏振强度在50%弱侧降低约60%，无法确认全局RM模式，系统不确定性δ_RM^sys=90 rad/m²。
AI.conclusion: Stokes Q和U立方体堆叠是恢复邻近星系微弱偏振发射的有效工具，但前提是PI、χ₀、RM的底层分布需严格约束，未来需利用更宽带数据提高法拉第深度分辨率。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系磁场调节恒星形成和宇宙射线（CR）输运，理解其三维结构，特别是在恒星形成的晚型星系中，是约束星系宇宙射线输运的关键。我们探索堆叠斯托克斯Q和U谱的有效性，以推断恒星形成星系的内在偏振特性。为准备堆叠实验，我们对27个恒星形成的晚型侧向星系的C波段（6 GHz）斯托克斯Q和U立方体进行对齐、缩放、卷积和重投影。在堆叠立方体上，我们执行RM合成并讨论导出的偏振强度（PI）、偏振角（χ₀）和RM图。合成数据测试表明，对于严格约束的PI、χ₀和RM底层分布，堆叠斯托克斯Q和U谱是有效的。对于代表恒星形成星系的PI、χ₀和RM分布，堆叠引入系统不确定性δ_RM^sys=90 rad m^{-2}，并显著低估恢复的PI。堆叠结果揭示偏振平面中清晰的X形图案，与先前发现一致，探测到高达9 kpc的星系盘上方偏振发射。我们在星系接近侧发现更强的PI。此外，我们发现星系晕中靠近星系短轴的PI下降约60%。先前研究报告的全局RM模式无法确认。基于我们的分析，我们提出堆叠斯托克斯Q和U立方体是恢复邻近星系晕中微弱偏振发射的有效工具，前提是PI、χ₀和RM的底层分布得到严格约束。我们的发现激励未来使用更宽带数据以提高法拉第深度分辨率的研究。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：Stokes Q和U立方体堆叠是恢复邻近星系微弱偏振发射的有效工具，但前提是PI、χ₀、RM的底层分布需严格约束，未来需利用更宽带数据提高法拉第深度分辨率。

The vector length corresponds to the PI. The black contour indicates the \(3\sigma\) -level of the PI emission. The shape of the synthesised beam is indicated in the bottom left corner.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：未进行流量归一化的角度缩放平均堆叠的PI图，叠加了偏振角（B场方向）信息。向量长度对应PI。黑色等高线表示\(3\sigma\)水平的PI发射。合成波束的形状在左下角指示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : LIC image of the polarised emission of the dbl aligned angular scaled and PI normalised median stack of high resolution galaxies. The stack consists of 15 galaxies that are covered by at least 19 beams along the galactic disc. Polarised emission close to the disc is coloured in magenta while the halo emission is displayed in blue. The visual symmetry arises from the dbl alignment strategy, where each galaxy enters the stack twice (once rotated by 180 deg). The underlying composite image (Irwin et al. , 2019a ) consists of the median stacked total synchrotron intensity of 30 CHANG-ES galaxies (Wiegert et al. , 2015 ) , displayed in grey, and the disc of NGC 5775 constructed from Hubble Space Telescope (HST) Advanced Camera for Surveys data in filters F625W (assigned green) and F658N (assigned red). The HST image is employed to show the extent of an optical disc relative to the halo.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：高分辨率星系的双重对齐角度缩放和PI归一化中值堆叠的偏振发射LIC图像。该堆叠由至少沿星系盘覆盖19个波束的15个星系组成。盘附近的偏振发射以洋红色着色，而晕发射以蓝色显示。视觉对称性源于双重对齐策略，每个星系进入堆叠两次（一次旋转180度）。底层合成图像（Irwin et al., 2019a）由30个CHANG-ES星系的中值堆叠总同步辐射强度（Wiegert et al., 2015）（以灰色显示）和由哈勃空间望远镜（HST）高级巡天相机在F625W（分配绿色）和F658N（分配红色）滤光片数据构建的NGC 5775盘组成。HST图像用于显示光学盘相对于晕的范围。

title: Prospects for Observing Galaxy Spectral Energy Distribution from the Radio to the far-Infrared in the Era of Next-Generation Radio Telescopes
summary: The superb sensitivity and angular resolution of the next-generation radio telescopes with combined frequency coverage of approximately over three orders of magnitude (100 MHz--100 GHz) will sample the radio and far-infrared (FIR) spectral energy distribution (SED) of galaxies and revolutionize the galaxy formation study at the epoch of re-ionization and beyond. We present a prospect of observing the radio--FIR continuum SEDs of galaxies in the redshift of up to $z\approx 20$ based on an ensemble of the simulated `energy balanced' panchromatic SED (from UV to FIR) extended to the radio. For `realistic' populations of UV star-forming galaxies and dusty star-forming galaxies, we simulate their SEDs by accounting for the CMB effect and the radio--IR correlation. The flux density evolution of the UV-bright star-forming galaxies and the dusty star-forming galaxies at the selected observing frequencies covered by the current (ALMA) and next generation (SKA and ngVLA) radio-millimeter telescopes, suggest that massive galaxies (M$_* \gtrsim 10^{10}$M$_{\odot}$) are detectable at any redshift ($0<z<20$) in high frequency ($ν>90$GHz). In particular, when operating, the ngVLA high-frequency ($\approx 100$ GHz) band is capable of detecting galaxies with M$_* \gtrsim 10^{9}$M$_{\odot}$ almost independently from redshift and the SKA low-frequency observing window ($\lesssim1$ GHz) has sufficient sensitivity to detect M$_* \gtrsim 10^{10}$M$_{\odot}$ dusty star-forming galaxies up to the epoch of reionization ($z=5\sim7$). We also show that the brightness of anomalous microwave emission (AME) in the galaxy SED is insignificant if the galaxies are beyond the local Universe (e.g., $z\gtrsim 0.1$).

title: Merge and Strip II: Imprint of galaxy formation physics and viscosity on baryon-dominated dwarf galaxies
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables; submitted to A&A
summary: Motivated by the discovery of peculiar dwarf galaxies inside galaxy clusters such as blue candidates (BCs), dark galaxies and ultra-diffuse galaxies (UDGs), we present hydrodynamic simulations of galaxy mergers in cluster environments. We vary the viscosity and stellar feedback prescriptions, realistically modelling possible conditions for hydrodynamic drag and fluid instabilities, as well as internal destabilization through stellar feedback-driven heating and gas loss. We find that long-lived tidal dwarf galaxies (TDGs) can form throughout all viscosity values applicable to galaxy clusters if stellar feedback is moderate. Our results expand on studies of cloud crushing simulations, investigating the entrainment problem in intracluster medium ambience. The smallest clouds have gas masses on the order of $M_\text{gas} \sim 10^7 \text{ M}_\odot$ and reach relatively low final drift velocities of $\sim 100 \text{ km/s}$. The lowest possible Reynolds number acting on this class of clouds is $Re \sim 1$ for full Spitzer viscosity. Almost all TDGs display elevated star formation rates of $0.01-0.1 \text{ M}_\odot / \text{yr}$, which are stable across several Gyr. Based on their matching properties, we support that BCs observed in the Virgo cluster are likely stripped TDGs. Similar features are also found in comparison with dark galaxies and baryon-dominated UDGs, implying that a subsample of these objects are also long-lived TDGs. This work provides robust evidence that stripping from galaxy mergers is a viable channel for the formation of stable cold gas clouds and dark matter-deficient galaxies observed in galaxy clusters.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 受星系团中发现的奇特矮星系（如蓝色候选体、暗星系和超扩散星系）的启发，我们展示了星系团环境中星系并合的流体动力学模拟。我们改变了粘度和恒星反馈方案，真实地模拟了流体动力学阻力和流体不稳定性以及通过恒星反馈驱动的加热和气体损失导致的内部失稳的可能条件。我们发现，如果恒星反馈适中，在适用于星系团的所有粘度值下，都可以形成长寿命的潮汐矮星系（TDGs）。我们的结果扩展了云团破碎模拟的研究，探讨了星系团内介质环境中的夹带问题。最小的云团气体质量约为 \(M_\text{gas} \sim 10^7 \text{ M}_\odot\)，最终漂移速度较低，约为 \(\sim 100 \text{ km/s}\)。对于完全斯皮策粘度，作用于这类云团的最低可能雷诺数为 \(Re \sim 1\)。几乎所有TDGs都显示出升高的恒星形成率，为 \(0.01-0.1 \text{ M}_\odot / \text{yr}\)，并且该速率在数亿年内保持稳定。基于其匹配特性，我们支持室女座星系团中观测到的蓝色候选体很可能是被剥离的TDGs。在与暗星系和重子主导的UDGs的比较中也发现了类似特征，表明这些天体中的一部分样本也是长寿命的TDGs。这项工作提供了有力证据，证明星系并合剥离是形成星系团中观测到的稳定冷气体云和暗物质缺失星系的有效途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：支持室女座星系团中的蓝色候选体很可能是被剥离的TDGs；暗星系和重子主导的UDGs中部分样本也可能是长寿命TDGs；星系并合剥离是形成星系团中稳定冷气体云和暗物质缺失星系的有效途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Pressure (left) and entropy (right) excess for all four simulations analyzed in this work. The letter in the bottom left corner of each panel indicates the setup (see Table 1 ). The scale in panel B denotes \(500\text{\,}{kpc}\) , while the dashed line indicates the virial radius \(R_{200,c}\) of the galaxy cluster. The merger remnant as well as the most massive and fastest dwarf galaxies drive a pressure wave through the cluster. The ram pressure stripped gas tails in simulations A and D (viscous) are relatively stable, while mixing in B and C (inviscid) quickly destroys them.

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Mass evolution for dwarf galaxies in the tested subgrid implementations over \(4\text{\,}{Gyr}\) . Left, middle and right panel show total mass \(M_{tot}\) , stellar mass \(M_{\ast}\) and gas mass \(M_{gas}\) , respectively, while the horizontal dashed line indicates a threshold of five particles. The viscous simulations A and D produce dwarf galaxies with relatively constant total masses, where their gas content is continuously converted into stars. The objects in simulation B experience delayed star formation bursts after a few Gyr of existing as quiescent dark galaxies. The additional winds in simulation C efficiently destabilizes and destroys the dwarfs during the first \(2\text{\,}{Gyr}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在 \(4\text{\,}{Gyr}\) 内，测试的亚网格实现中矮星系的质量演化。左、中、右面板分别显示总质量 \(M_{tot}\) 、恒星质量 \(M_{\ast}\) 和气体质量 \(M_{gas}\) ，而水平虚线表示五个粒子的阈值。粘性模拟A和D产生的矮星系总质量相对恒定，其气体含量持续转化为恒星。模拟B中的天体在作为静止暗星系存在数亿年后经历了延迟的恒星形成爆发。模拟C中的额外风在最初的 \(2\text{\,}{Gyr}\) 内有效地使矮星系失稳并摧毁。

The colored markers show the simulated objects, where the shade indicates the time between \(t=0-1.6\,Gyr\) that has passed after the stripping event in the simulations. Gray circles display an observational sample by Brodie et al. ( 2011 ) of giant, compact, and dwarf ellipticals (gE, cE, and dE), dwarf spheroidals (dSph), ultra-compact dwarfs (UCD), as well as globular and extended clusters (GC and EC). The pluses indicate the cE and UCD sample puplished by Norris et al. ( 2014 ) . The gray triangles and stars refer to ultra-diffuse galaxies (UDGs) in the Coma cluster by van Dokkum et al. ( 2015 ) and Zöller et al. ( 2024 ) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：矮星系的恒星半质量半径 \(r_{\ast,1/2}\) 与绝对（V波段）星等 \(M_{V}\) 的关系。彩色标记显示模拟天体，其中颜色深浅表示模拟中剥离事件后经过的时间 \(t=0-1.6\,Gyr\) 。灰色圆圈显示Brodie等人（2011）的观测样本，包括巨椭圆星系、致密椭圆星系和矮椭圆星系（gE、cE和dE）、矮球状星系（dSph）、超致密矮星系（UCD）以及球状星团和延展星团（GC和EC）。加号表示Norris等人（2014）发表的cE和UCD样本。灰色三角形和星号分别表示van Dokkum等人（2015）和Zöller等人（2024）在后发座星系团中的超扩散星系（UDGs）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Cumulative stellar mass over time, normalized by the dwarfs’ peak stellar mass. The colored lines show the actual evolution, while the black lines indicate the galaxies’ stellar body expected from its star formation rate. It becomes apparent that tidal stripping is far more efficient in the inviscid setups B and C.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：随时间累积的恒星质量，以矮星系峰值恒星质量归一化。彩色线显示实际演化，而黑线表示根据其恒星形成率预期的星系恒星主体。可以看出，在无粘设置B和C中，潮汐剥离的效率要高得多。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Mass evolution correlated with stellar size. We show the same as in Fig. 4 , but here the markers at the tracing times are colored according to the galaxy’s stellar half-mass radius. Black color means that the dwarf has less than six stellar particles.

title: Constraints on Phenomenological Amplitudes of CMB Anisotropy with Multi-Datasets
summary: Cosmic microwave background anisotropies encode crucial information about the early Universe and fundamental cosmological physics. Although the standard $Λ$CDM model provides a successful description of cosmic evolution, persistent cosmological tensions and subtle small-scale anomalies still challenge its internal consistency. In this paper, we investigate six phenomenological amplitude parameters $A_{\rm{new}}$ (new=L, SW, Dop, eISW, lISW, Pol) corresponding to the key effects related to CMB anisotropy: the Lensing, Sachs-Wolfe, Doppler, early Integrated Sachs-Wolfe, late Integrated Sachs-Wolfe, and Polarization effects, respectively. Using modified CAMB and Cobaya packages, we constrain the $Λ$CDM$+A_{\rm{new}}$ models with two data combinations: Planck+DESI+PantheonPlus (PDP) and Planck+ACT+DESI+PantheonPlus (PADP). Only the $Λ$CDM+$A_{\rm{L}}$ is favored by AIC, with $A_{\rm{L}}=1.0656_{-0.0303}^{+0.0304}$ from PDP and $A_{\rm{L}}=1.0795_{-0.0289}^{+0.0260}$ from PADP, which implies 2.16$σ$ and 3.06$σ$ deviation from the $Λ$CDM model; values of $A_{\rm{SW}}$ show 1.21$σ$ and 1.96$σ$ deviations to 1; $A_{\rm{lISW}}$ is poorly constrained because the lISW effect has negligible influence at $\ell \geq 30$; and others are consistent with the $Λ$CDM model. Moreover, no noticeable improvement on the Hubble and $σ_8$ tensions is found within these one-parameter extended scenarios. ACT DR6 high-$\ell$ data strengthens the $Λ$CDM$+A_{\rm{L}}$ preference over the $Λ$CDM model, and reduces $A_{\rm Pol}$ uncertainty by more than one order of magnitude, highlighting the importance of ground-based high-$\ell$ observations for future CMB analyses.

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入六个与CMB各向异性关键效应相关的振幅参数A_new，利用Planck+DESI+PantheonPlus和Planck+ACT+DESI+PantheonPlus两组数据组合，对ΛCDM模型进行扩展约束。结果表明仅透镜参数A_L被AIC支持，偏离ΛCDM模型2.16σ-3.06σ；其他参数大多与ΛCDM一致，且未能缓解Hubble和σ_8张力。ACT DR6高ℓ数据增强了A_L偏好并大幅降低极化参数不确定性。
AI.motivation: 标准ΛCDM模型虽成功描述宇宙演化，但存在持续的宇宙学张力和小尺度异常，内部一致性受到挑战，因此需要探索新的参数空间来检验模型。
AI.method: 定义六种与CMB各向异性相关的振幅参数（透镜、Sachs-Wolfe、多普勒、早期ISW、晚期ISW、极化），使用修改后的CAMB和Cobaya软件包，结合PDP和PADP两组数据组合进行贝叶斯参数估计。
AI.result: 仅ΛCDM+A_L模型受AIC支持，A_L偏离ΛCDM达2.16σ-3.06σ；A_SW有1.21σ-1.96σ偏离；A_lISW约束较差；其他参数与ΛCDM一致。Hubble和σ_8张力未见改善。ACT DR6数据增强了A_L偏好，并将极化参数不确定性降低一个数量级以上。
AI.conclusion: 透镜振幅参数偏离标准模型最显著，但单参数扩展无法缓解当前宇宙学主要张力；高ℓ地面观测对未来CMB分析具有重要意义。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙微波背景各向异性编码了关于早期宇宙和基础宇宙学物理的关键信息。尽管标准$Λ$CDM模型成功描述了宇宙演化，但持续的宇宙学张力和微妙的小尺度异常仍然挑战其内部一致性。本文研究了六个现象学振幅参数$A_{\rm{new}}$（new=L, SW, Dop, eISW, lISW, Pol），分别对应与CMB各向异性相关的关键效应：透镜效应、Sachs-Wolfe效应、多普勒效应、早期集成Sachs-Wolfe效应、晚期集成Sachs-Wolfe效应和极化效应。利用修改后的CAMB和Cobaya软件包，我们使用两种数据组合：Planck+DESI+PantheonPlus (PDP) 和 Planck+ACT+DESI+PantheonPlus (PADP)，对$Λ$CDM$+A_{\rm{new}}$模型进行了约束。只有$Λ$CDM+$A_{\rm{L}}$模型被AIC所青睐，其中$A_{\rm{L}}=1.0656_{-0.0303}^{+0.0304}$（来自PDP）和$A_{\rm{L}}=1.0795_{-0.0289}^{+0.0260}$（来自PADP），这意味着与$Λ$CDM模型分别有2.16σ和3.06σ的偏离；$A_{\rm{SW}}$的值显示出与1的1.21σ和1.96σ偏离；$A_{\rm{lISW}}$约束较差，因为lISW效应在$\ell \geq 30$时影响可忽略；其他参数与$Λ$CDM模型一致。此外，在这些单参数扩展场景中，未发现对哈勃张力和$σ_8$张力有明显改善。ACT DR6的高$\ell$数据增强了$Λ$CDM$+A_{\rm{L}}$相对于$Λ$CDM模型的偏好，并将$A_{\rm Pol}$的不确定性降低了一个数量级以上，突显了地面高$\ell$观测对未来CMB分析的重要性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用总结：透镜振幅参数偏离标准模型最显著，但单参数扩展无法缓解当前宇宙学主要张力；高ℓ地面观测对未来CMB分析具有重要意义。

title: A structural degeneracy explains reionization tensions and limits dark matter constraints
summary: Over the past decade, reionization studies have yielded persistent factor-of-two-to-five disagreements in the inferred ionizing escape fraction $f_{\mathrm{esc}}$ and peak star formation efficiency $f_{*,0}$, compounded by JWST's discovery of unexpectedly bright $z>10$ galaxies. We show that this discrepancy arises from an algebraically exact structural degeneracy: the ionizing photon rate $\dot{n}_{\mathrm{ion}} \propto f_{\mathrm{esc}} \times f_{*,0}$ renders all reionization-history probes, including Thomson optical depth, neutral hydrogen fraction, UV luminosity function, and quasar proximity zones, sensitive only to their product, leading to an intrinsically non-invertible mapping between model parameters and observations. We demonstrate the robustness of this degeneracy using a large suite of N-body simulations of self-interacting dark matter haloes spanning $10^9$-$10^{11} M_\odot$. Despite substantial changes to galaxy-scale structure, observables remain indistinguishable once the effective ionizing emissivity is matched, severely limiting reionization-based dark matter probes. We identify that only observables sensitive to the spatial topology of ionized regions can break this degeneracy. Our results provide a unified explanation for the scatter among published constraints and establish a framework for interpreting reionization observations and their implications for early galaxy formation and dark matter.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现再电离历史观测对逃逸分数 $f_{\mathrm{esc}}$ 和恒星形成效率 $f_{*,0}$ 存在代数简并性——观测只敏感于它们的乘积，导致参数反演不唯一。只有能探测电离区拓扑结构的观测才能打破这一简并。
AI.motivation: 过去十年间，再电离研究在电离光子逃逸分数 $f_{\mathrm{esc}}$ 和峰值恒星形成效率 $f_{*,0}$ 的推断上存在2-5倍的不一致，且JWST发现 $z>10$ 的星系异常明亮，现有模型无法自洽解释这些观测。
AI.method: 通过数学推导证明 $\dot{n}_{\mathrm{ion}} \propto f_{\mathrm{esc}} \times f_{*,0}$ 这一代数简并性，并利用一系列自相互作用暗物质晕的N体模拟（质量范围 $10^9$-$10^{11} M_\odot$）验证该简并的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 证实该简并性是精确且固有的：一旦有效电离发射率匹配，即使星系尺度结构发生显著变化，观测仍不可区分。这严重限制了基于再电离的暗物质探针。
AI.conclusion: 只有对电离区空间拓扑结构敏感的观测才能打破这一简并。该结果为已有约束之间的弥散提供了统一解释，并建立了解读再电离观测及其对早期星系形成和暗物质研究影响的框架。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在过去十年中，再电离研究在推断的电离光子逃逸分数 $f_{\mathrm{esc}}$ 和峰值恒星形成效率 $f_{*,0}$ 上持续存在两到五倍的分歧，而詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）发现的意外明亮的 $z>10$ 星系进一步加剧了这一矛盾。我们证明，这种分歧源于一个代数上精确的结构简并：电离光子产生率 $\dot{n}_{\mathrm{ion}} \propto f_{\mathrm{esc}} \times f_{*,0}$ 使得所有再电离历史探针——包括汤姆孙光学深度、中性氢分数、紫外光度函数和类星体近邻区域——仅对其乘积敏感，从而导致模型参数与观测之间本质上不可逆的映射。我们利用一系列覆盖 $10^9$-$10^{11} M_\odot$ 的自相互作用暗物质晕的 N 体模拟，证明了这种简并的稳健性。尽管星系尺度结构发生显著变化，但只要有效电离辐射率匹配，观测结果仍无法区分，这严重限制了基于再电离的暗物质探针。我们发现，只有对电离区域空间拓扑结构敏感的观测才能打破这种简并。我们的结果为已有约束之间的弥散提供了统一解释，并建立了一个用于解读再电离观测及其对早期星系形成和暗物质研究影响的框架。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用总结：只有对电离区空间拓扑结构敏感的观测才能打破这一简并。该结果为已有约束之间的弥散提供了统一解释，并建立了解读再电离观测及其对早期星系形成和暗物质研究影响的框架。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The escape fraction degeneracy: empirical evidence, mechanism, and resolution. (a) Published values of \(f_{esc}\) and \(f_{\star,0}\) from the last decade of reionization studies. Reionization budget models (red circles: Naidu et al. 2020 [ Naidu_2022 ] ; Finkelstein et al. 2019, 2022 [ Finkelstein:2019sbd , 2022ApJ...940L..55F ] ; Robertson 2022 [ Robertson:2021ljt ] ) solve for \(f_{esc}\) given assumed \(f_{\star,0}\) . Direct Lyman-continuum measurements (blue squares: Saldaña-López et al. 2022 [ 2022A&A...663A..59S ] ; Mascia et al. 2023 [ 2023A&A...674A.221M ] ; Pahl et al. 2025 [ Pahl:2024utu ] ; Begley et al. 2025 [ 2025MNRAS.537.3245B ] ) constrain \(f_{esc}\) at \(z\sim 3\) – \(5\) as a low-redshift proxy. Hydrodynamical simulations (green diamonds: Ma et al. 2020 [ Ma:2020vlo ] ; SPHINX [ 2022MNRAS.515.2386R ] ; THESAN [ Yeh:2022nsl ] ) predict both quantities from first principles. The dashed line and yellow band show \(f_{esc}\times f_{\star,0}=(2.5\pm 0.8)\times 10^{-3}\) , the product required to match Planck \(\tau\) and the \(\bar{x}_{HI}(z)\) constraints. All values scatter along this degenerate direction rather than perpendicular to it. The apparent factor-of-five disagreement in \(f_{esc}\) between Naidu et al. ( \(\sim 20\%\) ) and Finkelstein et al. ( \(\sim 5\%\) ) is a manifestation of the structural degeneracy rather than systematic error. (b) The two-step optimiser trajectory in the \((f_{\star,0},f_{esc})\) plane. Starting from the CDM solution (black open circle) on the data-allowed hyperbola (yellow band), SIDM ( \(\sigma/m=10\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) , \(\eta=0.5\) ) forces the UVLF optimiser to raise \(f_{\star,0}\) by \(\sim 47\%\) (Step 1, blue arrow). This moves the model off the hyperbola to the red cross, where \(\dot{n}_{ion}\) exceeds the reionization budget. The reionization optimiser then lowers \(f_{esc}\) along a vertical trajectory (Step 2, green arrow) until the model returns to the hyperbola at a new point (red sq
figures.caption_zh: 图1：逃逸分数简并：经验证据、机制和解决方案。(a) 过去十年再电离研究中发表的 \(f_{esc}\) 和 \(f_{\star,0}\) 值。再电离预算模型（红色圆圈：Naidu等人2020 [ Naidu_2022 ]；Finkelstein等人2019, 2022 [ Finkelstein:2019sbd , 2022ApJ...940L..55F ]；Robertson 2022 [ Robertson:2021ljt ]）在假设 \(f_{\star,0}\) 的情况下求解 \(f_{esc}\) 。直接莱曼连续谱测量（蓝色方块：Saldaña-López等人2022 [ 2022A&A...663A..59S ]；Mascia等人2023 [ 2023A&A...674A.221M ]；Pahl等人2025 [ Pahl:2024utu ]；Begley等人2025 [ 2025MNRAS.537.3245B ]）在 \(z\sim 3\) – \(5\) 处约束 \(f_{esc}\) 作为低红移代理。流体动力学模拟（绿色菱形：Ma等人2020 [ Ma:2020vlo ]；SPHINX [ 2022MNRAS.515.2386R ]；THESAN [ Yeh:2022nsl ]）从第一性原理预测这两个量。虚线和黄色带显示 \(f_{esc}\times f_{\star,0}=(2.5\pm 0.8)\times 10^{-3}\) ，这是匹配Planck \(\tau\) 和 \(\bar{x}_{HI}(z)\) 约束所需的乘积。所有值都沿着这个简并方向散射，而不是垂直于它。Naidu等人（约20%）和Finkelstein等人（约5%）之间 \(f_{esc}\) 的五倍表观分歧是结构简并的表现，而非系统误差。(b) \((f_{\star,0},f_{esc})\) 平面中的两步优化器轨迹。从数据允许的双曲线（黄色带）上的CDM解（黑色空心圆）开始，SIDM（ \(\sigma/m=10\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) ， \(\eta=0.5\) ）迫使UVLF优化器将 \(f_{\star,0}\) 提高约47%（步骤1，蓝色箭头）。这将模型移出双曲线，到达红色叉号处，此时 \(\dot{n}_{ion}\) 超过再电离预算。然后，再电离优化器沿垂直轨迹降低 \(f_{esc}\) （步骤2，绿色箭头），直到模型返回到双曲线上的一个新点（红色方块）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Calibration of the SIDM-induced binding energy change from 230 GIZMO simulations. (a) Dark matter density profiles for an \(M=10^{10}\,M_{\odot}\) halo at \(z=7\) with \(\sigma/m=0\) (CDM, solid black) and \(\sigma/m=1,5,10\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) (dashed coloured). SIDM thermalises the inner halo, replacing the NFW cusp with an isothermal core; the displaced mass accumulates at intermediate radii. Vertical lines mark the \(R=0.5,1,2\) kpc integration boundaries used in panels (b)–(d). (b) Scale dependence of \(\Delta_{bind}( [ Wang:2025xre ] : both results are correct at their respective integration radii. (c) The \(\Delta_{bind}(\sigma/m)\) relation at three redshifts saturates above \(\sigma/m\sim 5\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) , well-described by \(\Delta_{bind}=A\tanh(\sigma/m/\sigma_{crit})\) with \(A\approx 0.73\) , \(\sigma_{crit}\approx 3.2\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) (grey dashed). Saturation reflects the finite depth of the NFW cusp. (d) Mass dependence at \(\sigma/m=10\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) across three redshifts. The slope \(d\log\Delta_{bind}/d\log M\approx+0.37\) at \(z=7\) (yellow box) is the central physical finding: the SIDM signal is strongly weighted toward massive halos, while the low-mass haloes that dominate the UV photon budget during reionization are nearly unaffected. The slope is approximately redshift-independent, reflecting that core formation has saturated by \(z=10\) in the densest halos.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：基于230个GIZMO模拟的SIDM诱导的结合能变化校准。(a) 在 \(z=7\) 时，一个 \(M=10^{10}\,M_{\odot}\) 的暗物质晕在 \(\sigma/m=0\) （CDM，黑色实线）和 \(\sigma/m=1,5,10\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) （彩色虚线）下的暗物质密度轮廓。SIDM使内部晕热化，用等温核取代NFW尖点；被置换的质量在中间半径处累积。垂直线标记了面板(b)–(d)中使用的 \(R=0.5,1,2\) kpc积分边界。(b) \(\Delta_{bind}( [ Wang:2025xre ]\) 的尺度依赖性：两个结果在其各自的积分半径处都是正确的。(c) 三个红移处的 \(\Delta_{bind}(\sigma/m)\) 关系在 \(\sigma/m\sim 5\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) 以上饱和，由 \(\Delta_{bind}=A\tanh(\sigma/m/\sigma_{crit})\) 很好地描述，其中 \(A\approx 0.73\) ， \(\sigma_{crit}\approx 3.2\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) （灰色虚线）。饱和反映了NFW尖点的有限深度。(d) 在 \(\sigma/m=10\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) 下，三个红移处的质量依赖性。 \(z=7\) 处的斜率 \(d\log\Delta_{bind}/d\log M\approx+0.37\) （黄色框）是核心物理发现：SIDM信号强烈偏向大质量晕，而在再电离期间主导紫外光子预算的低质量晕几乎不受影响。该斜率近似与红移无关，反映了在密度最高的晕中，核形成在 \(z=10\) 时已经饱和。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Probe-by-probe sensitivity to SIDM in the \((\sigma/m,\eta)\) plane. Each panel shows the constraint from a single observable (or class of observables) on the same 9 representative SIDM grid points. Green circles indicate parameter points consistent with the data; red crosses indicate exclusion at 95% confidence. (a) UV luminosity function: JWST measurements of the high-redshift UVLF [ 2024MNRAS.533.3222D , 2025ApJ...980..138H ] exclude no SIDM points; \(f_{\star,0}\) and \(\sigma_{UV}\) absorb the SIDM signal across the entire parameter space ( \(\Delta\chi^{2} [ Wang:2026lly ] ). (b) Planck Thomson optical depth \(\tau\) : The integrated value \(\tau=0.054\pm 0.007\) [ Planck2018 ] provides no constraint because \(f_{esc}\) adjusts to absorb the \(\dot{n}_{ion}\) shift induced by SIDM, leaving \(\tau\) unchanged. (d) Lyman- \(\alpha\) luminosity function: Despite probing a different observational signature, the Ly \(\alpha\) LF is constructed from \(\dot{n}_{ion}\) in the same way and inherits the same product degeneracy. figures.caption_zh: 图3：在 \((\sigma/m,\eta)\) 平面中，各探针对SIDM的敏感性。每个面板显示了来自单个可观测（或一类可观测）对相同9个代表性SIDM网格点的约束。绿色圆圈表示与数据一致的参数点；红色叉号表示在95%置信度下被排除。(a) 紫外光度函数：JWST对高红移UVLF的测量 [ 2024MNRAS.533.3222D , 2025ApJ...980..138H ] 未排除任何SIDM点； \(f_{\star,0}\) 和 \(\sigma_{UV}\) 在整个参数空间吸收了SIDM信号（ \(\Delta\chi^{2} [ Wang:2026lly ]\) ）。(b) Planck汤姆孙光学深度 \(\tau\) ：积分值 \(\tau=0.054\pm 0.007\) [ Planck2018 ] 未提供约束，因为 \(f_{esc}\) 会调整以吸收SIDM引起的 \(\dot{n}_{ion}\) 偏移，使 \(\tau\) 保持不变。(c) 来自JWST阻尼翼的中性分数 \(\bar{x}_{HI}(z)\) ：在 \(z=6.5\) – \(11\) 处的八次测量 [ 2024ApJ...971..124U , Mason:2025xae , Greig:2017jdj , Mason:2019ixe ] 未能约束SIDM，原因相同：红移相关的 \(f_{esc}(z)\) 吸收了任何时间线偏移。(d) 莱曼- \(\alpha\) 光度函数：尽管探测了不同的观测特征，但Ly \(\alpha\) LF以相同方式由 \(\dot{n}_{ion}\) 构建，并继承了相同的乘积简并。(e) 在 \(z\sim 3\) 处的直接莱曼连续谱测量结合 \(f_{esc}\) –占空比爆发相关性：LyC先验 [ Pahl:2024utu , 2025MNRAS.537.3245B , 2023A&A...674A.221M ] （ \(\sigma_{f_{esc}}=0.03\) ）结合物理相关性 \(\alpha_{esc}=0.3\) 部分打破了简并，排除了9个点中的5个。 \(\sigma/m=1\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) 区域仍然完全不受约束。(f) 使用SKA1-Low的21厘米再电离拓扑结构：拓扑信号取决于固定 \(\bar{x}_{HI}\) 下每个晕的占空比，这在结构上独立于 \(f_{esc}\times f_{\star,0}\) 乘积和SFE耦合参数 \(\eta\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Joint constraints on SIDM in the \((\sigma/m,\eta)\) parameter plane with SKA1-Low observational forecast. The blue shaded region marks SIDM parameters excluded by the joint UV luminosity function and stellar mass function analysis of ref [ Wang:2026lly ] ; this constraint dominates at high \(\eta\) because larger SFE coupling translates SIDM core formation more strongly into UVLF suppression. The red dashed contour marks the \(95\%\) confidence boundary from the combination of \(\tau\) , \(\bar{x}_{HI}(z)\) , the Lyman-continuum prior ( \(\sigma_{f_{esc}}=0.03\) ), and the \(f_{esc}\) –duty-cycle blowout correlation ( \(\alpha_{esc}=0.3\) ; this work, Methods); this constraint dominates at high \(\sigma/m\) where the mass-weighted \(\Delta_{bind}\) becomes large enough to drive a measurable \(f_{esc}\) enhancement. The two reionization-era exclusions are complementary, with a crossover near \(\sigma/m\approx 5\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) . The hatched purple band shows the range \(\eta=0.08\) – \(0.20\) calibrated from FIRE-2 SIDM hydrodynamical simulations [ 2025arXiv251005258G ] , with central value \(\eta=0.11\) at \(z=7\) (Methods). The vertical green lines show the minimum cross-section detectable at \(5\sigma\) via 21 cm reionization topology with SKA1-Low for three integration times: 500 h ( \(\sigma/m\geq 4.3\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) , dot-dashed), 1000 h ( \(\sigma/m\geq 2.0\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) , solid), and 5000 h ( \(\sigma/m\geq 0.7\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) , dashed). The pale green band shows the parameter space accessible at the longest integration. Because topology depends on the duty cycle of ionizing-photon escape rather than on the total photon rate, these thresholds are independent of \(\eta\) . At physically motivated couplings, the joint reionization-era constraint excludes \(\sigma/m\gtrsim 5\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) , while \(\sigma/m\lesssim 2\,{cm}^{2}\,{g}^{-1}\) remains fully allowed by all \(\dot{n}_{ion}\) -dependent probes; this gap is fu

Left: The profiled CDM baseline escape fraction \(f_{esc,0}\) at each \(\eta\) , for \(\sigma/m=5\) and 10 with \(\sigma_{f_{esc}}=0.03\) . title: Euclid preparation. CosmoPostProcess: A simulation calibrated framework for weak lensing selection bias in richness-selected galaxy clusters
summary: We present \texttt{CosmoPostProcess}, a simulation-based forward-modelling algorithm calibrated to reproduce Euclid optical cluster observables. Its main deliverable is a correction for stacked surface-density profiles, binned in richness and redshift, accounting for selection systematics in richness-selected samples relative to unbiased references. We focus on the Euclid richness definition foreseen for cosmological analyses, which does not apply a colour selection; red-sequence richness is not considered. The algorithm processes $N$-body simulations by painting galaxies with a halo-occupation model and emulating survey detection and richness assignment. We also implement a novel estimate of optical cluster centres from projected galaxy densities, validated against Euclid pipelines. Baryonic effects are included through a correction calibrated on hydrodynamical simulations; the baryon-corrected excess surface density agrees within \(2\,\%\) over \(r\in[0.1,\,5]\,h^{-1}\,\mathrm{Mpc}\). Selection-bias contributions are assessed by varying cosmology and the mass--richness relation. Projection-induced selection bias follows a robust pattern: correlated large-scale structure projected along the line of sight enhances the stacked profile near the one-halo to two-halo transition, peaking at about \(1\,h^{-1}\,\mathrm{Mpc}\) with an amplitude of \(20\!-\!40\,\%\), depending on richness and redshift. The effect is mild at low and intermediate redshift ($z\lesssim0.7$), at the few-percent level, but becomes more relevant at higher redshift ($z\gtrsim0.7$). Baryonic modifications remain sub-dominant outside the core, at about \(2\,\%\) beyond \(r\gtrsim0.3\,h^{-1}\,\mathrm{Mpc}\). The framework delivers radial profile corrections with uncertainties, combining projection-induced selection bias, baryonic physics, and miscentring, to control systematics in Euclid DR1 cluster cosmology. (abridged)

AI.tldr: 本文提出CosmoPostProcess算法，用于修正Euclid巡天中富度选择星系团样本的堆叠表面密度轮廓，校正投影选择偏差、重子物理和中心偏移等系统效应，为Euclid DR1星系团宇宙学分析提供系统学控制。
AI.motivation: Euclid巡天中的富度选择星系团样本存在投影效应等系统偏差，需要一种前向模拟方法来校正这些系统学，以便获得无偏的堆叠表面密度轮廓，用于精确的宇宙学分析。
AI.method: 基于N体模拟，采用晕族占据模型(HOD)描绘星系，模拟巡天探测和富度分配过程；提出基于投影星系密度估计光学星系团中心的新方法；利用流体动力学模拟校准重子修正；通过改变宇宙学和质量-富度关系评估选择偏差。
AI.result: 投影诱导的选择偏差在1 h⁻¹Mpc处达到20-40%的峰值；低红移(z≲0.7)时影响较小(~百分之几)，高红移(z≳0.7)更显著；重子修正仅在核心区域外约2%。重子修正后的超表面密度在0.1-5 h⁻¹Mpc范围内一致性优于2%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够提供包含投影选择偏差、重子物理和中心偏移不确定性的径向轮廓修正，为Euclid DR1星系团宇宙学中的系统学控制提供关键工具。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了\texttt{CosmoPostProcess}，一种基于模拟的前向建模算法，经过校准以重现欧几里得（Euclid）光学星团观测特征。其主要输出是对按丰度和红移分组的堆叠表面密度轮廓的修正，考虑了相对于无偏参考样本的丰度选择样本中的选择系统学。我们重点关注为宇宙学分析而设想的欧几里得丰度定义，该定义不应用颜色选择；红序列丰度未被考虑。该算法通过使用晕占据模型绘制星系并模拟巡天探测和丰度分配来处理$N$体模拟。我们还实现了一种基于投影星系密度的光学星团中心新估计方法，并针对欧几里得流程进行了验证。重子效应通过基于流体动力学模拟校准的修正纳入；经重子修正的超额表面密度在$r\in[0.1,\,5]\,h^{-1}\,\mathrm{Mpc}$范围内一致性优于$2\,\%$。通过改变宇宙学和质量-丰度关系来评估选择偏差的贡献。投影诱导的选择偏差遵循一个稳健的模式：沿视线投影的关联大尺度结构增强了单晕到双晕过渡附近的堆叠轮廓，在约$1\,h^{-1}\,\mathrm{Mpc}$处达到峰值，幅度为$20\!-\!40\,\%$，取决于丰度和红移。在低和中等红移（$z\lesssim0.7$）处，效应较小，处于百分之几的水平，但在较高红移（$z\gtrsim0.7$）处变得更加显著。在核心之外，重子修正仍处于次主导地位，在$r\gtrsim0.3\,h^{-1}\,\mathrm{Mpc}$以外约为$2\,\%$。该框架提供带有不确定性的径向轮廓修正，结合了投影诱导的选择偏差、重子物理和中心偏移，以控制欧几里得DR1星团宇宙学中的系统学。（删节版）
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该框架能够提供包含投影选择偏差、重子物理和中心偏移不确定性的径向轮廓修正，为Euclid DR1星系团宇宙学中的系统学控制提供关键工具。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: PICCOLO high-resolution simulations. Summary of the cosmological parameters adopted for the C0 and C1 runs: present-day matter density \(\Omega_{{m}}\) , reduced Hubble parameter \(h\equiv H_{0}/(100\,{km\,s^{-1}\,Mpc^{-1}})\) , scalar spectral index of the primordial power spectrum \(n_{{s}}\) , and linear-theory fluctuation amplitude on \(8\,h^{-1}\,{Mpc}\) scales \(\sigma_{8}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：PICCOLO高分辨率模拟。C0和C1运行所采用的宇宙学参数总结：当前物质密度 \(\Omega_{{m}}\) 、约化哈勃参数 \(h\equiv H_{0}/(100\,{km\,s^{-1}\,Mpc^{-1}})\) 、原初功率谱标量谱指数 \(n_{{s}}\) 以及 \(8\,h^{-1}\,{Mpc}\) 尺度上的线性理论涨落幅度 \(\sigma_{8}\) 。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Magneticum configurations used in this work. Cosmologies M1–M15 vary \(\Omega_{{m}}\) , \(\Omega_{{b}}\) , \(\sigma_{8}\) , and \(h\) around the WMAP7 fiducial (Ragagnin et al. 2023 ; Singh et al. 2020 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：本工作中使用的Magneticum配置。宇宙学模型M1–M15在WMAP7基准（Ragagnin et al. 2023 ; Singh et al. 2020 ）附近变化 \(\Omega_{{m}}\) 、 \(\Omega_{{b}}\) 、 \(\sigma_{8}\) 和 \(h\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Median surface density profiles \(\Sigma\) and relative scatter for about \(3000\) objects within a narrow mass bin centred on \(M=10^{14}\,h^{-1}\,M_{\odot}\) . The blue dotted curve is for the original average profile, while dashed orange, dot-long dashed green, and dot-short dashed red curves refer to the effect of including baryonic correction, miscentring, and both effects together, respectively. For the latter, the shaded area indicates the \(1\,\sigma\) statistical uncertainty.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：约 \(3000\) 个位于以 \(M=10^{14}\,h^{-1}\,M_{\odot}\) 为中心的窄质量区间内天体的中值表面密度轮廓 \(\Sigma\) 及相对弥散。蓝色点线为原始平均轮廓，而橙色虚线、绿点长划线、红点短划线分别表示包含重子修正、中心偏移以及两者共同影响的效果。对于后者，阴影区域表示 \(1\,\sigma\) 统计不确定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The relation between \(R_{vir}\) and \(R_{pmem}\) in proper \({Mpc}\) units from Flagship2 . Orange points show the binned mean and the standard deviation as a function of \(R_{vir}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自Flagship2的以本征 \({Mpc}\) 为单位的 \(R_{vir}\) 与 \(R_{pmem}\) 之间的关系。橙色点显示作为 \(R_{vir}\) 函数的分箱均值及标准差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Normalised counts as a function of \(f_{{bkg}}\) , as predicted by the CosmoPostProcess model (solid blue line) and by the Flagship2 model (orange dashed line).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：作为 \(f_{{bkg}}\) 函数的归一化计数，由CosmoPostProcess模型（蓝色实线）和Flagship2模型（橙色虚线）预测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Upper panel : median mass–richness relation and \(1\sigma\) scatter envelope. The blue curve shows the relation for the true richness calibrated on Flagship2 , while the green curve shows the observed richness obtained by recomputing the richness with the CosmoPostProcess membership-probability emulator. Here, observed richness denotes the final richness returned by the mock pipeline after the emulation and post-processing steps, in contrast to the true richness defined at the HOD level. Lower panel : relative variation of the observed richness with respect to the true richness, \((\lambda_{obs}-\lambda_{true})/\lambda_{true}\) . The offset is not introduced through a separate correction term, but arises because projected galaxies and galaxies overlapping in photometric redshift can receive non-zero emulated membership probabilities, \(P_{{mem}}^{{emu}}\) , and therefore contribute to \(\lambda_{obs}\) . This naturally produces an upward shift and an increased scatter in the reconstructed richness, especially at low halo masses, with projection effects acting on top of the usual scatter induced by Eddington bias.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：上方面板：中值质量-丰度关系及 \(1\sigma\) 弥散包络。蓝色曲线显示基于Flagship2校准的真实丰度关系，而绿色曲线显示通过使用CosmoPostProcess成员概率仿真器重新计算丰度得到的观测丰度。此处，观测丰度表示在仿真和后处理步骤之后由模拟流程返回的最终丰度，与在HOD层面定义的真实丰度相对。下方面板：观测丰度相对于真实丰度的相对变化， \((\lambda_{obs}-\lambda_{true})/\lambda_{true}\) 。该偏移并非通过单独的修正项引入，而是因为投影星系和在测光红移上重叠的星系可能获得非零的仿真成员概率 \(P_{{mem}}^{{emu}}\) ，从而对 \(\lambda_{obs}\) 有贡献。这自然导致重建丰度出现向上偏移和更大的弥散，尤其是在低晕质量时，投影效应叠加在通常由爱丁顿偏差引起的弥散之上。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Top panel : transverse section of a cluster with \(M_{vir}\simeq 3\times 10^{14}\,h^{-1}\,{M_{\odot}}\) from the PICCOLO C0 simulation processed with CosmoPostProcess . The black circle marks the \(R_{pmem}\) projected radial cut, with galaxies colour-coded according to their \(P^{{emu}}_{{mem}}\) values. True member galaxies are highlighted by red boxes, while red crosses indicate all objects above \(M_{vir}=10^{14}\,h^{-1}\,{M_{\odot}}\) . Bottom panel : line-of-sight view of the same object restricted to the redshift interval covered by the first PICCOLO snapshot.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：上方面板：来自经CosmoPostProcess处理的PICCOLO C0模拟中一个 \(M_{vir}\simeq 3\times 10^{14}\,h^{-1}\,{M_{\odot}}\) 星团的横向截面。黑色圆圈标记 \(R_{pmem}\) 投影径向截断，星系颜色根据其 \(P^{{emu}}_{{mem}}\) 值编码。真实成员星系由红色方框突出显示，而红色叉号表示所有质量高于 \(M_{vir}=10^{14}\,h^{-1}\,{M_{\odot}}\) 的天体。下方面板：同一天体在第一个PICCOLO快照所覆盖红移区间内的视线方向视图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Illustration of our miscentring scheme, applied to a \(M_{vir}=1.62\times 10^{14}\,h^{-1}\,M_{\odot}\) cluster in the Flagship2 simulation. Purple points show galaxies with \(P_{mem}>0.5\) and \(z_{cl}-\sigma_{z}\leq z_{gal}\leq z_{cl}+\sigma_{z}\) . The colour map shows the Gaussian-smoothed projected galaxy number density of the same galaxies, in units of galaxies per \({Mpc}^{-2}\) . The red hatched region marks pixels with surface density above the median value of the map. The red triangle, blue star, and black dot mark the weighted pixel centre, the PZWav centre, and the true centre, respectively. The scale bar shown in the panel corresponds to \(1\,{Mpc}\) at the cluster redshift. For a full validation of the miscentring model, including the agreement at the level of the miscentring distribution, we refer the reader to Fig. 7 .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：我们的中心偏移方案示意图，应用于Flagship2模拟中一个 \(M_{vir}=1.62\times 10^{14}\,h^{-1}\,M_{\odot}\) 的星团。紫色点显示满足 \(P_{mem}>0.5\) 且 \(z_{cl}-\sigma_{z}\leq z_{gal}\leq z_{cl}+\sigma_{z}\) 的星系。颜色图显示相同星系的高斯平滑投影星系数密度，单位为每 \({Mpc}^{-2}\) 的星系数。红色阴影区域标记表面密度高于图中值像素的像素。红色三角形、蓝色星形和黑色点分别标记加权像素中心、PZWav中心和真实中心。面板中显示的比例尺对应于星团红移处的 \(1\,{Mpc}\) 。关于中心偏移模型的完整验证，包括中心偏移分布层面的一致性，我们请读者参考图7。
